description:
Speak, don't type

Speak naturally, and Typeless will turn your words into polished messages, emails, and documents that read like you carefully typed them - in real time. 4x faster than typing.
Bulk import for Dictionary

Dictionary now supports bulk import for the vocabulary that matters to your work, from people's names and project acronyms to domain terms and industry terminology.
- Import multiple words from a file: Click New word in Dictionary and choose Import to add the words in your file.
We hope this helps Typeless keep up with the words you use every day.
